positive: Minimalist silhouette illustration of a majestic, stylized golden retriever and a whimsical flying hot air balloon against a deep twilight indigo gradient background. The composition should be perfectly centered, with the dog looking happily toward the balloon. Use highly contrasting linework and solid color blocking, reminiscent of modern Nordic graphic design. The overall mood is optimistic, warm, and dreamy. Ideal for screen printing on dark apparel. Style should be clean vector art, high contrast, maximum readability, isolated elements, sticker design.
negative: low quality, noise, blurry, artifacts, text, signature, watermark, bad anatomy, extra limbs, messy, complex detail, gradient mess
